title: Origins: Devil Contract
description: Devil Contract introduces a dark pact system where players trade their humanity for terrifying abilities. By signing a contract, you gain powerful, supernatural buffs
body:
# **😈 Devil Contract**

Power always comes at a price.

Devil Contract introduces a dark pact system where players trade their humanity for terrifying abilities. By signing a contract, you gain powerful, supernatural buffs — but the Devil always collects his payment.

## 🔥 Abilities Granted
## 
Devil Strength – Gain unnatural strength beyond human limits.

Infernal Leap – Perform monstrous jumps and become immune to fall damage.

Devil Vision – See clearly even in complete darkness.

Hell Resilience – Fire and flames bow before the Devil’s mark.

Blood Rage – Unleash immense power at the cost of rapidly draining hunger.

## 🩸 The Price

Carnivore Curse – Your body rejects plants. Only meat can sustain you.

Blood Price – Every ten days, the Devil comes to collect his payment.

## ⚠️ Gameplay Focus

High-risk, high-reward progression

Dark fantasy / demonic roleplay themes

Strategic survival with long-term consequences

Sign the contract…
but remember — every ability has a price.
